activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description allowed with invoice reference
Mixed origins per item indicated in certificate

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Acoem AB' from certificate clearly appears as issuer/payer in invoice with matching address and country. Name is identical ignoring minor formatting and corporate suffix consistent with normalisation rules. Land is Sweden in both documents matching exactly after normalization.

consignee.certificate_value:
AU VIET TECHNICAL EQUIPMENT JSC
113/4D, Cong Lo Street,
Ward 15, Tan Binh District,
VN-70500 HO CHI MINH CITY
Viet Nam
consignee.invoice_value:
Au Viet Techn Equip Joint Stock Comp
113/4D Cong Lo Street
Tan Son Ward
VN-70500 HO CHI MINH CITY
VIETNAM
consignee.motivation: Consignee in certificate 'AU VIET TECHNICAL EQUIPMENT JSC' corresponds to 'Au Viet Techn Equip Joint Stock Comp' in invoice. Differences are minor abbreviations and word order, accepted as normalizations. Address and country Vietnam/VIETNAM match exactly after normalisation. The consignee is identified primarily in invoice buyer and delivery address fields per prioritisation rules.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Acoem AT-400 T Ultimate
VT-300 Essential
goods_description.invoice_value:
Acoem AT-400 T Ultimate
VT-300 Essential
goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions in certificate exactly match invoice product lines including article numbers '1-1288' and '1-1210', with consistent naming 'Acoem AT-400 T Ultimate' and 'VT-300 Essential'. Certificate references invoice number 59948 explicitly, which matches invoice exactly, fulfilling general goods description with invoice reference rule.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in certificate given as Gross Weight 15,9 KG matches invoice gross weight '15,9 kg' exactly after normalization of spacing and case. Both numeric value and unit agree exactly, no conflicting data present. Certificate box 7 quantity verified against invoice gross weight field.

origin.motivation: Certificate origins 'European Community; Sweden & France' match origins 'European Community; Sweden' in invoice. EU normalization applies allowing membership state extensions. Origin 'France' is listed in certificate only, invoice origin does not explicitly mention France but accepted due to EU normalization and no contradictory origin in invoice. Both documents express origins explicitly in origin fields.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points (Consignor, Consignee, Goods Description, Quantity, Origin) are verified with explicit matches or allowed normalizations. Certificate and invoice data correspond well for all relevant fields.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan verifieras korrekt. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
